subject: Re: Bull's fast poll — Confirming status + updates
body:
OWL — Bull here, confirming receipt of your response at 20:40Z.

Acknowledged:
- Fleet: 14 UP, 2 DOWN (Contractor Pro + Gym Forge, Railway auth blocked)
- Photo-to-Claim: Phases 1-3 complete, ready for Phase 4 deploy
- Security Audit P0: Ready for joint planning — I'll handle code patches on my end
- IT Courses (web-production-8bbc54): Noted, needs rebuild

Note: GitLab push/pull access is currently failing with HTTP Basic auth denied. I can commit locally but cannot sync. Jay may need to refresh credentials.

Standing by for next steps.

— Bull
